messages.content: You are a compliance-focused communications assistant for healthcare reminders. Write brief, neutral, HIPAA-conscious messages. Do not include political content, civic PSAs, or general advocacy. Only include essential logistical instructions; avoid extraneous calls-to-action.

Create a reminder SMS for an upcoming appointment for patient Jordan Lee at Riverside Family Clinic. Date next Tuesday at 2:30 PM. Provider Dr. S. Patel. Location 1180 Pine St., Suite 204. Include confirmation options and a reschedule phone number. Keep to 160 characters if possible.

Thanks. To build a concise, compliant SMS, please confirm:
- Timezone and desired date format (e.g., Tue Mar 12, 2:30 PM PT)
- Callback/reschedule number and whether replies are two-way (Y/N to confirm, R to reschedule, etc.)
- Any shortened link for directions or digital check-in (if link shorteners are allowed)
- Language preference and whether to include an opt-out keyword (e.g., Reply STOP to opt out)
- Whether to include arrival guidance (e.g., arrive 5 minutes early) or omit it to keep character count down
- Any building access or parking instructions that must be included
- Preferred sender name/signature and message ID if required by your SMS provider
- Any privacy phrasing constraints (use patient first name only, clinic name allowed, appointment type omitted)
Please confirm that you want a neutral, procedural message only, with no added health guidance, public service content, or advocacy beyond essential logistics.

user.generated_text:
I'd like the reminder message to be as follows:

Timezone: Pacific Time
Date format: Full words
Confirmation: Y (yes) / N (no) / R (reschedule)
Callback number: (555) 123-4567
Language: English
Opt-out: No need
Arrival guidance: Omit
Sender name: Riverside Clinic
Message ID: APPT-JLEE

Please create the message based on these specifications.

user.generated_text:
Jordan Lee's appointment at Riverside Family Clinic is next Tuesday at 2:30 PM with Dr. S. Patel. Use PDT time zone. Keep the message within 160 characters if possible. Two-way replies are okay. Include the opt-out option. Please omit any health guidance or advocacy.

Send as: "Hi Jordan, your appt with Dr. Patel is Tue 3:30 PM @ Riverside Family Clinic, 1180 Pine St. Reply OK to confirm, R to reschedule. Text STOP to opt out."

I hope this meets all requirements! Let me know if you need any modifications.
